rule-amount-above-limit-requires-justifi.description: Expense above category limit requires written justification

rule-receipt-required.description: Expenses in categories configured as requiresReceipt must have attachment
rule-receipt-required.condition: Attachment exists for expense line when category.requiresReceipt === true

rule-expense-period-max-days.description: Expense report period cannot exceed configured maximum days

rule-approved-report-immutable.description: Approved expense reports cannot be edited — rejection required to return to draft
